description: Case style: Gold toned round case with a fixed bezel, crystal studded Dial style: Black dial, golden hands Strap style: Black leather strap with tang clasp Features: Logo at the 12-hour mark, screw to reset time, solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability, diamanté studded Water resistance up to 30 meters - wearable while washing hands and in mild rain Warranty: 2 years from the date of purchase
